name: foreman
description: Delegate scoped coding work to AI engineer workers in isolated git worktrees.

interface.shortDescription: Delegate coding tasks to AI workers in isolated worktrees.
interface.longDescription: Run scoped Claude Code, Codex, Gemini, or Aider engineering workers in isolated git worktrees, then collect diffs back for architect review, tests, merge, PR, or discard.
defaultPrompt: Split this repo task into independent worker specs and delegate them with Foreman.
Collect the Foreman worker diffs and review them before merging.
Run a Foreman smoke test in treemark.
